family_left_behind: Her children Daniel Martin and Elise Parker, four grandchildren, and a wide circle of church friends and neighbors.
career: She spent three decades teaching elementary school and later volunteered at the public library.
favorite_memory: Every Sunday she baked cinnamon bread before church and made sure no one left hungry.
passions: Gardening, choirs, handwritten letters, and local literacy programs.
service_details: A memorial service will be held Saturday, May 2 at 11:00 a.m. at First Community Church in Fort Collins.
wanted_line: She would want people to remember that kindness is something you practice every day.
anything_missing: She loved yellow roses and kept fresh stems on the kitchen table whenever she could.
